# Hermes Agent v0.14.0 (v2026.5.14)

**Release Date:** May 14, 2026
**Since v0.13.0:** Incremental improvements, bug fixes, and new provider support.

## ✨ Highlights

- Updated model catalog with latest provider releases
- Improved credential pool handling and OAuth flows
- Enhanced gateway platform reliability
- Refined context engine and compression strategies
- Additional skill improvements and curator enhancements
